mmMagicResistanc.name: Magic Resistance

0lf6wzfUsp3jTIti.description:
You take control of the weather within 5 miles of you for the duration. You must be outdoors to cast this spell, and it ends early if you go indoors.

When you cast the spell, you change the current weather conditions, which are determined by the DM. You can change precipitation, temperature, and wind. It takes 1d4 × 10 minutes for the new conditions to take effect. Once they do so, you can change the conditions again. When the spell ends, the weather gradually returns to normal.

When you change the weather conditions, find a current condition on the following tables and change its stage by one, up or down. When changing the wind, you can change its direction.

Precipitation
StageCondition
1Clear
2Light clouds
3Overcast or ground fog
4Rain, hail, or snow
5Torrential rain, driving hail, or blizzard
Temperature
StageCondition
1Heat wave
2Hot
3Warm
4Cool
5Cold
6Freezing
Wind
StageCondition
1Calm
2Moderate wind
3Strong wind
4Gale
5Storm
0lf6wzfUsp3jTIti.name: Control Weather

1N2neNzwvXKVcU5x.description:
You contact a deity or a divine proxy and ask up to three questions that can be answered with yes or no. You must ask your questions before the spell ends. You receive a correct answer for each question.

Divine beings aren't necessarily omniscient, so you might receive "unclear" as an answer if a question pertains to information that lies beyond the deity's knowledge. In a case where a one-word answer could be misleading or contrary to the deity's interests, the DM might offer a short phrase as an answer instead.

If you cast the spell more than once before finishing a Long Rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get no answer.
1N2neNzwvXKVcU5x.name: Commune

CqPrcjjGFXcwb6lK.description:
With a touch, you revive a dead creature that has been dead for no more than a century, didn't die of old age, and wasn't Undead when it died.

The creature returns to life with all its Hit Points. This spell also neutralizes any poisons that affected the creature at the time of death. This spell closes all mortal wounds and restores any missing body parts.

Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Casting this spell to revive a creature that has been dead for 365 days or longer taxes you. Until you finish a Long Rest, you can't cast spells again, and you have Disadvantage on D20 Tests.
CqPrcjjGFXcwb6lK.name: Resurrection

Fmei7YO1waLBqeSJ.description: You touch a creature and end one condition on it: &Reference[blinded], &Reference[deafened], &Reference[paralyzed], or &Reference[poisoned].
Fmei7YO1waLBqeSJ.name: Lesser Restoration

UBpYC2J5kdms3616.description: At your touch, all curses affecting one creature or object end. If the object is a cursed magic item, its curse remains, but the spell breaks its owner's Attunement to the object so it can be removed or discarded.
UBpYC2J5kdms3616.name: Remove Curse

jb9GlwVmpAclDUSd.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCureWounds]{Cure Wounds} (level 2 version), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLesserRest]{Lesser Restoration}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRemoveCurs]{Remove Curse}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
jb9GlwVmpAclDUSd.name: Divine Aid

kiSJTCgeflbQIcAL.description:
For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions.

Break Enchantment. As a Magic action, you touch a creature that is possessed by or has the &Reference[Charmed] or &Reference[Frightened] condition from one or more creatures of the types above. The target is no longer possessed, Charmed, or Frightened by such creatures.

Dismissal. As a Magic action, you target one creature you can see within 5 feet of you that has one of the creature types above. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be sent back to its home plane if it isn't there already. If they aren't on their home plane, Undead are sent to the Shadowfell, and Fey are sent to the Feywild.
kiSJTCgeflbQIcAL.name: Dispel Evil and Good

lNdiEuYQ2WarE6UR.description:
A creature you touch regains a number of Hit Points equal to 2d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The healing increases by 2d8 for each spell slot level above 1.
lNdiEuYQ2WarE6UR.name: Cure Wounds

mmBlindingGaze00.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=B6xM8C2pABIb5o7y]], one creature the [[lookup @name lowercase]] can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=B6xM8C2pABIb5o7y]] feet.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] condition for 1 minute.

Failure or Success: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.
mmBlindingGaze00.name: Blinding Gaze

mmDivineAwarenes.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] knows if it hears a lie.
mmDivineAwarenes.name: Divine Awareness

mmExaltedRestora.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.
mmExaltedRestora.name: Exalted Restoration

mmFlyingSword000.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. Hit or Miss: The sword magically returns to the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s hand or hovers within 5 feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]] immediately after a ranged attack.
mmFlyingSword000.name: Flying Sword

mmLegendaryResis.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
mmLegendaryResis.name: Legendary Resistance

mmMagicResistanc.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
mmMagicResistanc.name: Magic Resistance

mmMultiattack000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes two [[/item Flying Sword]] attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of [[/item Slaying Bow]].
mmMultiattack000.name: Multiattack

mmRadiantTelepor.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]] teleports up to [[lookup @range.value activity=HtsFBK1PYKjvy9mn]] feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=HtsFBK1PYKjvy9mn]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=HtsFBK1PYKjvy9mn]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]] at its destination space.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.
mmRadiantTelepor.name: Radiant Teleport

mmSlayingBow0000.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=C7BMf8hIfCjxRSWC]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=C7BMf8hIfCjxRSWC]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]] can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=C7BMf8hIfCjxRSWC]] [[lookup @range.units activity=C7BMf8hIfCjxRSWC]].

Failure: If the [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=C7BMf8hIfCjxRSWC]] has 100 Hit Points or fewer, it dies. It otherwise takes [[/damage average]] damage.
mmSlayingBow0000.name: Slaying Bow

mmSpellcasting00.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]] casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectEvil]{Detect Evil and Good}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCommune000]{Commune}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplControlWea]{Control Weather}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelEvil]{Dispel Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplResurrecti]{Resurrection}
mmSpellcasting00.name: Spellcasting

ovdN9mRTyXP1j08C.description:
For the duration, you sense the location of any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself. You also sense whether the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.
ovdN9mRTyXP1j08C.name: Detect Evil and Good

mmIncorporealMov.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can move through other creatures and objects as if they were &Reference[Difficult Terrain]. It takes [[/damage 1d10 average type=force]] damage if it ends its turn inside an object.
mmIncorporealMov.name: Incorporeal Movement

mmLifeDrain00000.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a creature, its Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.
mmLifeDrain00000.name: Life Drain

mmSunlightSensit.description: While in sunlight, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.
mmSunlightSensit.name: Sunlight Sensitivity

mmSphinxOfLore00.name: Sphinx of Lore
mmSphinxOfLore00.biography:
Sphinxes

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.JPdmXY7WGZdIPlJo caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Token artwork by Forgotten Adventures.

3QtVeoLFpQD2ZIZ6.description:
Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any ongoing spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends. For each ongoing spell of level 4 or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (DC 10 plus that spell's level). On a successful check, the spell ends.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You automatically end a spell on the target if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you use.
3QtVeoLFpQD2ZIZ6.name: Dispel Magic

3iFVzsqSf2WVQfPZ.description:
For the duration, you sense the presence of magical effects within 30 feet of yourself. If you sense such effects, you can take the Magic action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears the magic, and if an effect was created by a spell, you learn the spell's school of magic.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.
3iFVzsqSf2WVQfPZ.name: Detect Magic

5BhLlAXMXjt3FGgl.description:
You create a sound or an image of an object within range that lasts for the duration. See the descriptions below for the effects of each. The illusion ends if you cast this spell again.

If a creature takes a Study action to examine the sound or image, the creature can determine that it is an illusion with a successful [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, the illusion becomes faint to the creature.

Sound. If you create a sound, its volume can range from a whisper to a scream. It can be your voice, someone else's voice, a lion's roar, a beating of drums, or any other sound you choose. The sound continues unabated throughout the duration, or you can make discrete sounds at different times before the spell ends.

Image. If you create an image of an object—such as a chair, muddy footprints, or a small chest—it must be no larger than a 5-foot Cube. The image can't create sound, light, smell, or any other sensory effect. Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, since things can pass through it.
5BhLlAXMXjt3FGgl.name: Minor Illusion

BcQlXdMvzWgF3rml.description:
You create a magical effect within range. Choose the effect from the options below. If you cast this spell multiple times, you can have up to three of its non-instantaneous effects active at a time.

Sensory Effect. You create an instantaneous, harmless sensory effect, such as a shower of sparks, a puff of wind, faint musical notes, or an odd odor.

Fire Play. You instantaneously light or snuff out a candle, a torch, or a small campfire.

Clean or Soil. You instantaneously clean or soil an object no larger than 1 cubic foot.

Minor Sensation. You chill, warm, or flavor up to 1 cubic foot of nonliving material for 1 hour.

Magic Mark. You make a color, a small mark, or a symbol appear on an object or a surface for 1 hour.

Minor Creation. You create a nonmagical trinket or an illusory image that can fit in your hand. It lasts until the end of your next turn. A trinket can deal no damage and has no monetary worth.
BcQlXdMvzWgF3rml.name: Prestidigitation

I43UVsLdC2ERiWej.description:
You and up to eight willing creatures who link hands in a circle are transported to a different plane of existence. You can specify a target destination in general terms, such as the City of Brass on the Elemental Plane of Fire or the palace of Dispater on the second level of the Nine Hells, and you appear in or near that destination, as determined by the DM.

Alternatively, if you know the sigil sequence of a teleportation circle on another plane of existence, this spell can take you to that circle. If the teleportation circle is too small to hold all the creatures you transported, they appear in the closest unoccupied spaces next to the circle.
I43UVsLdC2ERiWej.name: Plane Shift

IPZZTC6sjbIVCUVY.description:
Name or describe a famous person, place, or object. The spell brings to your mind a brief summary of the significant lore about that famous thing, as described by the DM.

The lore might consist of important details, amusing revelations, or even secret lore that has never been widely known. The more information you already know about the thing, the more precise and detailed the information you receive is. That information is accurate but might be couched in figurative language or poetry, as determined by the DM.

If the famous thing you chose isn't actually famous, you hear sad musical notes played on a trombone, and the spell fails.
IPZZTC6sjbIVCUVY.name: Legend Lore

XSFpn9go4Lz1KDDZ.description:
A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration. The hand vanishes if it is ever more than 30 feet away from you or if you cast this spell again.

When you cast the spell, you can use the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial.

As a Magic action on your later turns, you can control the hand thus again. As part of that action, you can move the hand up to 30 feet.

The hand can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.
XSFpn9go4Lz1KDDZ.name: Mage Hand

jclLNcK4S0eIgQqs.description:
Describe or name an object that is familiar to you. You sense the direction to the object's location if that object is within 1,000 feet of you. If the object is in motion, you know the direction of its movement.

The spell can locate a specific object known to you if you have seen it up close—within 30 feet—at least once. Alternatively, the spell can locate the nearest object of a particular kind, such as a certain kind of apparel, jewelry, furniture, tool, or weapon.

This spell can't locate an object if any thickness of lead blocks a direct path between you and the object.
jclLNcK4S0eIgQqs.name: Locate Object

leUcbtUfszTZvsrL.description:
You touch an object throughout the spell's casting. If the object is a magic item or some other magical object, you learn its properties and how to use them, whether it requires Attunement, and how many charges it has, if any. You learn whether any ongoing spells are affecting the item and what they are. If the item was created by a spell, you learn that spell's name.

If you instead touch a creature throughout the casting, you learn which ongoing spells, if any, are currently affecting it.
leUcbtUfszTZvsrL.name: Identify

mmArcaneProwl000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can teleport up to [[lookup @range.value activity=a3RqyzU0UqzLJif0]] feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and it makes one [[/item Claw]] attack.
mmArcaneProwl000.name: Arcane Prowl

mmInscrutable000.description: No magic can observe the [[lookup @name lowercase]] remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with Disadvantage.
mmInscrutable000.name: Inscrutable

mmLegendaryResis.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
mmLegendaryResis.name: Legendary Resistance

mmMindrendingRoa.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=zPMfwwIoTFzIrN5H]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=zPMfwwIoTFzIrN5H]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=zPMfwwIoTFzIrN5H]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]].

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s next turn.
mmMindrendingRoa.name: Mind-Rending Roar

mmMultiattack000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes three [[/item Claw]] attacks.
mmMultiattack000.name: Multiattack

mmSpellcasting00.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]] casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detect Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplIdentify00]{Identify}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMageHand00]{Mage Hand}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMinorIllus]{Minor Illusion}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]{Prestidigitation}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLegendLore]{Legend Lore}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLocateObje]{Locate Object}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPlaneShift]{Plane Shift}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRemoveCurs]{Remove Curse}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplTongues000]{Tongues}
mmSpellcasting00.name: Spellcasting

mmWeightOfYears0.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=xZul1ImCP658OBv3]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=xZul1ImCP658OBv3]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]] can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=xZul1ImCP658OBv3]] feet.

Failure: The target gains 1 &Reference[Exhaustion apply=false] level. While the target has any Exhaustion levels, it appears [[/r 3d10]] years older.

Failure or Success: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.
mmWeightOfYears0.name: Weight of Years

n7uKSkGfYqj4FjU6.description: This spell grants the creature you touch the ability to understand any spoken or signed language that it hears or sees. Moreover, when the target communicates by speaking or signing, any creature that knows at least one language can understand it if that creature can hear the speech or see the signing.
n7uKSkGfYqj4FjU6.name: Tongues

qLsO05aCvad2nWG6.description: At your touch, all curses affecting one creature or object end. If the object is a cursed magic item, its curse remains, but the spell breaks its owner's Attunement to the object so it can be removed or discarded.
qLsO05aCvad2nWG6.name: Remove Curse

mmSphinxOfValor0.biography:

2ndWwKbQG28cUDsw.description:
For the duration, you sense the location of any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself. You also sense whether the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.
2ndWwKbQG28cUDsw.name: Detect Evil and Good

BXk2z10EMxnzvN4W.description:
You touch a creature and magically remove one of the following effects from it:

  • 1 &Reference[Exhaustion] level
  • The &Reference[Charmed] or &Reference[Petrified] condition
  • A curse, including the target's Attunement to a cursed magic item
  • Any reduction to one of the target's ability scores
  • Any reduction to the target's Hit Point maximum
BXk2z10EMxnzvN4W.name: Greater Restoration

DfCLvZVa4EKzFByM.description:
For the duration, you sense the presence of magical effects within 30 feet of yourself. If you sense such effects, you can take the Magic action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears the magic, and if an effect was created by a spell, you learn the spell's school of magic.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.
DfCLvZVa4EKzFByM.name: Detect Magic

PsTixp9srIi2sCpI.description:
You create a magical zone that guards against deception in a 15-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point within range. Until the spell ends, a creature that enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there makes a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, a creature can't speak a deliberate lie while in the radius. You know whether a creature succeeds or fails on this save.

An affected creature is aware of the spell and can avoid answering questions to which it would normally respond with a lie. Such a creature can be evasive yet must be truthful.
PsTixp9srIi2sCpI.name: Zone of Truth

fK99FtV5a8VoCNTl.description:
You manifest a minor wonder within range. You create one of the effects below within range. If you cast this spell multiple times, you can have up to three of its 1-minute effects active at a time.

Altered Eyes. You alter the appearance of your eyes for 1 minute.

Booming Voice. Your voice booms up to three times as loud as normal for 1 minute. For the duration, you have Advantage on [[/check ability=cha skill=itm]] checks.

Fire Play. You cause flames to flicker, brighten, dim, or change color for 1 minute.

Invisible Hand. You instantaneously cause an unlocked door or window to fly open or slam shut.

Phantom Sound. You create an instantaneous sound that originates from a point of your choice within range, such as a rumble of thunder, the cry of a raven, or ominous whispers.

Tremors. You cause harmless tremors in the ground for 1 minute.
fK99FtV5a8VoCNTl.name: Thaumaturgy

mmArcaneProwl000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can teleport up to [[lookup @range.value activity=a3RqyzU0UqzLJif0]] feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and it makes one [[/item Claw]] attack.
mmArcaneProwl000.name: Arcane Prowl

mmInscrutable000.description: No magic can observe the [[lookup @name lowercase]] remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with Disadvantage.
mmInscrutable000.name: Inscrutable

mmLegendaryResis.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
mmLegendaryResis.name: Legendary Resistance

mmMultiattack000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes two [[/item Claw]] attacks and uses [[/item Roar]].
mmMultiattack000.name: Multiattack

mmRoar0000000000.description:
The sphinx emits a magical roar. Whenever it roars, the roar has a different effect, as detailed below (the sequence resets when it takes a Long Rest):

First Roar.

Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=Igeu89TALGlNPXDg]], each enemy in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=Igeu89TALGlNPXDg]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]].

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition for [[lookup @duration.value activity=Igeu89TALGlNPXDg]] [[lookup @duration.units activity=Igeu89TALGlNPXDg]].

Second Roar.

Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=uFTndQPvULZVHT9R]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=uFTndQPvULZVHT9R]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=uFTndQPvULZVHT9R]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]].

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After [[lookup @duration.value activity=uFTndQPvULZVHT9R]] [[lookup @duration.units activity=uFTndQPvULZVHT9R]], it succeeds automatically.

Third Roar.

Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=Td8ArIMDfxWDLbE9]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=Td8ArIMDfxWDLbE9]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=Td8ArIMDfxWDLbE9]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]].

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Success: [[lookup @damage.onSave capitalize activity=Td8ArIMDfxWDLbE9]] damage only.
mmRoar0000000000.name: Roar

mmSpellcasting00.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]] casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectEvil]{Detect Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]{Thaumaturgy}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detect Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGreaterRes]{Greater Restoration}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHeroesFeas]{Heroes' Feast}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplZoneofTrut]{Zone of Truth}
mmSpellcasting00.name: Spellcasting

mmWeightOfYears0.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=xZul1ImCP658OBv3]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=xZul1ImCP658OBv3]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]] can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=xZul1ImCP658OBv3]] feet.

Failure: The target gains 1 &Reference[Exhaustion apply=false] level. While the target has any Exhaustion levels, it appears [[/r 3d10]] years older.

Failure or Success: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.
mmWeightOfYears0.name: Weight of Years

sDcBqPl7Y7t7OD6n.description:
You conjure a feast that appears on a surface in an unoccupied 10-foot Cube next to you. The feast takes 1 hour to consume and disappears at the end of that time, and the beneficial effects don't set in until this hour is over. Up to twelve creatures can partake of the feast.

A creature that partakes gains several benefits, which last for 24 hours. The creature has &Reference[damageResistance]{Resistance} to Poison damage, and it has Immunity to the &Reference[Frightened] and &Reference[Poisoned] conditions. Its Hit Point maximum also increases by 2d10, and it gains the same number of Hit Points.
sDcBqPl7Y7t7OD6n.name: Heroes' Feast

w3fU9CJNOK5kJtrb.description:
Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any ongoing spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends. For each ongoing spell of level 4 or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (DC 10 plus that spell's level). On a successful check, the spell ends.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You automatically end a spell on the target if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you use.
w3fU9CJNOK5kJtrb.name: Dispel Magic

uiOacfEeMdLH84D7.description: Trigger: The [[lookup @name]] or another creature within [[lookup @range.value activity=AyYipNx3cFaXA0LU]] feet makes an ability check or a saving throw. Response: The sphinx adds 2 to the roll.
uiOacfEeMdLH84D7.name: Burst of Ingenuity

mmSpiderClimb000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
mmSpiderClimb000.name: Spider Climb

mmWebWalker00000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the [[lookup @name lowercase]] knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.
mmWebWalker00000.name: Web Walker

Token artwork by Forgotten Adventures.

0TYpeSGwwVhokYoU.description:
You activate one of the effects below. Until the spell ends, you can activate either effect as a Magic action on your later turns.

Sense Thoughts. You sense the presence of thoughts within 30 feet of yourself that belong to creatures that know languages or are telepathic. You don't read the thoughts, but you know that a thinking creature is present.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Read Thoughts. Target one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself or one creature within 30 feet of yourself that you detected with the Sense Thoughts option. You learn what is most on the target's mind right now. If the target doesn't know any languages and isn't telepathic, you learn nothing.

As a Magic action on your next turn, you can try to probe deeper into the target's mind. If you probe deeper, the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, you discern the target's reasoning, emotions, and something that looms large in its mind (such as a worry, love, or hate). On a successful save, the spell ends. Either way, the target knows that you are probing into its mind, and until you shift your attention away from the target's mind, the target can take an action on its turn to make an [[/check ability=int skill=arc dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC, ending the spell on a success.
0TYpeSGwwVhokYoU.name: Detect Thoughts

3fMt232wtzBUxB1m.description:
You teleport to a location within range. You arrive at exactly the spot desired. It can be a place you can see, one you can visualize, or one you can describe by stating distance and direction, such as "200 feet straight downward" or "300 feet upward to the northwest at a 45-degree angle."

You can also teleport one willing creature. The creature must be within 5 feet of you when you teleport, and it teleports to a space within 5 feet of your destination space.

If you, the other creature, or both would arrive in a space occupied by a creature or completely filled by one or more objects, you and any creature traveling with you each take 4d6 Force damage, and the teleportation fails.
3fMt232wtzBUxB1m.name: Dimension Door

FPXJqMmeIZ9rTLFW.description:
Choose a Humanoid that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[paralyzed apply=false] condition for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You can target one additional Humanoid for each spell slot level above 2.
FPXJqMmeIZ9rTLFW.name: Hold Person

Rd4Kg9SxqLxAALXU.description:
A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration. The hand vanishes if it is ever more than 30 feet away from you or if you cast this spell again.

When you cast the spell, you can use the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial.

As a Magic action on your later turns, you can control the hand thus again. As part of that action, you can move the hand up to 30 feet.

The hand can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.
Rd4Kg9SxqLxAALXU.name: Mage Hand

etbC3HZq7ExbtgmW.description:
A stroke of lightning forming a 100-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line blasts out from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the Line makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.
etbC3HZq7ExbtgmW.name: Lightning Bolt

ga8WMfpmg6XsmKzG.description:
You create a sound or an image of an object within range that lasts for the duration. See the descriptions below for the effects of each. The illusion ends if you cast this spell again.

If a creature takes a Study action to examine the sound or image, the creature can determine that it is an illusion with a successful [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, the illusion becomes faint to the creature.

Sound. If you create a sound, its volume can range from a whisper to a scream. It can be your voice, someone else's voice, a lion's roar, a beating of drums, or any other sound you choose. The sound continues unabated throughout the duration, or you can make discrete sounds at different times before the spell ends.

Image. If you create an image of an object—such as a chair, muddy footprints, or a small chest—it must be no larger than a 5-foot Cube. The image can't create sound, light, smell, or any other sensory effect. Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, since things can pass through it.
ga8WMfpmg6XsmKzG.name: Minor Illusion

l6QBJ7Y0NAqE3rnq.description: This spell grants up to ten willing creatures of your choice within range the ability to breathe underwater until the spell ends. Affected creatures also retain their normal mode of respiration.
l6QBJ7Y0NAqE3rnq.name: Water Breathing

mmFiendishRestor.description: If it dies, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] returns to life in [[/r 1d6]] days and regains all its Hit Points. Only a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWish000000]{Wish} spell can prevent this trait from functioning.
mmFiendishRestor.name: Fiendish Restoration

2/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectThou]{Detect Thoughts}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDimensionD]{Dimension Door}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHoldPerson]{Hold Person} (level 3), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLightningB]{Lightning Bolt} (level 4)

ppISVKQQqC18ap6D.description:
For the duration, you sense the presence of magical effects within 30 feet of yourself. If you sense such effects, you can take the Magic action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears the magic, and if an effect was created by a spell, you learn the spell's school of magic.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

rHwlDG85kUcrUFdg.description:
You alter time around up to six creatures of your choice in a 40-foot Cube within range. Each target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be affected by this spell for the duration.

An affected target's Speed is halved, it takes a −2 penalty to AC and Dexterity saving throws, and it can't take Reactions. On its turns, it can take either an action or a Bonus Action, not both, and it can make only one attack if it takes the Attack action. If it casts a spell with a Somatic component, there is a [[/r 1d100cs<=25#Slowed spell cast success]]{25 percent} chance the spell fails as a result of the target making the spell's gestures too slowly.

An affected target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Foundry Note

The inline roll above will return 1 if it succeeded or 0 if it failed.
rHwlDG85kUcrUFdg.name: Slow

FuybodXmPwcWpHYX.description:
You touch one Large or smaller object that isn't being worn or carried by someone else. Until the spell ends, the object sheds Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. The light can be colored as you like.

Covering the object with something opaque blocks the light. The spell ends if you cast it again.
FuybodXmPwcWpHYX.name: Light

P1YPgugYe3pgj9DW.description:
You take control of the weather within 5 miles of you for the duration. You must be outdoors to cast this spell, and it ends early if you go indoors.

When you cast the spell, you change the current weather conditions, which are determined by the DM. You can change precipitation, temperature, and wind. It takes 1d4 × 10 minutes for the new conditions to take effect. Once they do so, you can change the conditions again. When the spell ends, the weather gradually returns to normal.

When you change the weather conditions, find a current condition on the following tables and change its stage by one, up or down. When changing the wind, you can change its direction.

Precipitation
StageCondition
1Clear
2Light clouds
3Overcast or ground fog
4Rain, hail, or snow
5Torrential rain, driving hail, or blizzard
Temperature
StageCondition
1Heat wave
2Hot
3Warm
4Cool
5Cold
6Freezing
Wind
StageCondition
1Calm
2Moderate wind
3Strong wind
4Gale
5Storm
P1YPgugYe3pgj9DW.name: Control Weather

a7WqdxaUOqFULucH.description:
For the duration, you sense the presence of magical effects within 30 feet of yourself. If you sense such effects, you can take the Magic action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears the magic, and if an effect was created by a spell, you learn the spell's school of magic.

ngMn9mjUa63VWbHY.description:
One Humanoid you can see within range must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition for the duration. The target has Advantage on the save if you or your allies are fighting it. Whenever the target takes damage, it repeats the save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

You have a telepathic link with the Charmed target while the two of you are on the same plane of existence. On your turn, you can use this link to issue commands to the target (no action required), such as "Attack that creature," "Move over there," or "Fetch that object." The target does its best to obey on its turn. If it completes an order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it acts and moves as it likes, focusing on protecting itself.

You can command the target to take a Reaction but must take your own Reaction to do so.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. Your Concentration can last longer with a spell slot of level 6 (up to 10 minutes), 7 (up to 1 hour), or 8+ (up to 8 hours).
ngMn9mjUa63VWbHY.name: Dominate Person

mmMultiattack000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes one [[/item .mmBite0000000000]] attack and three other attacks, using [[/item .mmClaw0000000000]] or [[/item .mmTail0000000000]] in any combination.
mmMultiattack000.name: Multiattack

mmOnslaught00000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one [[/item .mmClaw0000000000]] or [[/item .mmTail0000000000]] attack.
mmOnslaught00000.name: Onslaught

mmReflectiveCara.description:
If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] is targeted by a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMagicMissi]{Magic Missile} spell or a spell that requires a ranged attack roll, roll [[/r 1d6]].

On a 1–5, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] is unaffected.

On a 6, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] is unaffected and reflects the spell, turning the caster into the target.
mmReflectiveCara.name: Reflective Carapace

mmSwallow0000000.description:
Strength Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=YorssyWMumAsvzx3]], [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=YorssyWMumAsvzx3]] by the [[lookup @name lowercase]] (it can have up to six creatures swallowed at a time).

Failure: The target is swallowed, and the Grappled condition ends. A swallowed creature has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Restrained apply=false] conditions and can't teleport, it has &Reference[Total Cover] against attacks and other effects outside the [[lookup @name lowercase]], and takes [[/damage average activity=zrWNjO9mkbN28spL]] damage at the start of each of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s turns.

If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] takes 60 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] must succeed on a [[/save format=long activity=rGeGukkm2t2fXsoy]] at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within [[lookup @range.value activity=rGeGukkm2t2fXsoy]] feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]] and has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition. If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting Prone.
mmSwallow0000000.name: Swallow

mmTail0000000000.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.
mmTail0000000000.name: Tail

mmThunderousBell.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=RWBqtTjGSlEgQWCl]], [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=RWBqtTjGSlEgQWCl]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=RWBqtTjGSlEgQWCl]]-[[lookup @target.template.units activity=RWBqtTjGSlEgQWCl]]. [[lookup @target.template.type capitalize activity=RWBqtTjGSlEgQWCl]].

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Deafened apply=false] and &Reference[Frightened apply=false] conditions until the end of its next turn.

Success: Half damage only.
mmThunderousBell.name: Thunderous Bellow

mmNimbleEscape00.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] takes the &Reference[Disengage] or &Reference[Hide] action.
mmNimbleEscape00.name: Nimble Escape

mmRend0000000000.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.
mmRend0000000000.name: Rend

iD5121TXziB6ZcSt.name: Warhammer

mmMultiattack000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes two attacks, using [[/item .iD5121TXziB6ZcSt]] or [[/item .7MS7v84QoTYESVax]] in any combination.
mmMultiattack000.name: Multiattack

mmPackTactics000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.
mmPackTactics000.name: Pack Tactics

lqG4KueiyzdOy01v.description: The [[lookup @name]] magically animates up to two trees it can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=EceTNjzjKWdrMNAy]] feet of itself. Each tree uses the Treant stat block, except it has Intelligence and Charisma scores of 1, it can't speak, and it lacks this action. The tree takes its turn immediately after the treant on the same initiative count, and it obeys the treant. A tree remains animate for 1 day or until it dies, the treant dies, or it is more than 120 feet from the treant. The tree then takes root if possible.
lqG4KueiyzdOy01v.name: Animate Trees

mmMultiattack000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes two [[/item mmSlam0000000000]] attacks.
mmMultiattack000.name: Multiattack

mmSiegeMonster00.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] deals double damage to objects and structures.
mmSiegeMonster00.name: Siege Monster

mmGore0000000000.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage extended average]]. If the target is a [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=iBenqFiBu40bUxkH]] creature and the [[lookup @name lowercase]] moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra [[/damage 2d8 average type=piercing]] damage and has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.
mmGore0000000000.name: Gore

mmMultiattack000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes two [[/item .mmGore0000000000]] attacks.
mmMultiattack000.name: Multiattack

mmCharge00000000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] moves up to [[lookup @range.special activity=Y2IncZu5BjB42z7l]] straight toward an enemy it can see.
mmCharge00000000.name: Charge

mmLoathsomeLimbs.description:
If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] ends any turn Bloodied and took 15+ Slashing damage during that turn, one of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]l's limbs is severed, falls into the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s space, and becomes a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmTrollLimb00000]{Troll Limb}. The limb acts immediately after the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s turn. The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has 1 &Reference[Exhaustion apply=false] level for each missing limb, and it grows replacement limbs the next time it regains Hit Points.

Foundry Note

This feature provides an Active Effect condition in the character sheet's Effects tab to enable each level of Exhaustion. Since the condition can be applied multiple times, the GM must manually manage the level of Exhaustion. There is an active effect available for each level of exhaustion.
mmLoathsomeLimbs.name: Loathsome Limbs

mmMultiattack000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes three [[/item .mmRend0000000000]] attacks.
mmMultiattack000.name: Multiattack

mmRegeneration00.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] regains [[lookup @healing.formula activity=5cGvjZJIJVicjJ3d]] Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.
mmRegeneration00.name: Regeneration

mmRegeneration00.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] regains [[lookup @healing.formula activity=5cGvjZJIJVicjJ3d]] Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.
mmRegeneration00.name: Regeneration

mmTrollSpawn0000.description: The limb uncannily has the same senses as a whole [[lookup @name lowercase]]. If the limb isn't destroyed within 24 hours, roll [[/r 1d12#On a 12, the limb turns into a troll]]{roll 1d12}. On a 12, the limb turns into a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmTroll000000000]{Troll}. Otherwise, the limb withers away.
mmTrollSpawn0000.name: Troll Spawn

mmBite0000000000.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]])). While Grappled, the target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=falsse] condition and can't be targeted by the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s Tail.
mmBite0000000000.name: Bite

mmMultiattack000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes one [[/item .mmBite0000000000]] attack and one [[/item .mmTail0000000000]] attack.
mmMultiattack000.name: Multiattack

mmTail0000000000.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.
mmTail0000000000.name: Tail

DKRD4BpOE7xCo1AQ.description:
Each Humanoid in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point you choose within range must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be affected by one of the following effects (choose for each creature):

  • The creature has Immunity to the Charmed and Frightened conditions until the spell ends. If the creature was already Charmed or Frightened, those conditions are suppressed for the duration.
  • The creature becomes Indifferent about creatures of your choice that it's Hostile toward. This indifference ends if the target takes damage or witnesses its allies taking damage. When the spell ends, the creature's attitude returns to normal.
DKRD4BpOE7xCo1AQ.name: Calm Emotions

KBC4PegvxoFmk1SU.description: You radiate a concealing aura in a 30-foot Emanation for the duration. While in the aura, you and each creature you choose have a +10 bonus to [[/check ability=dex skill=ste]] checks and leave no tracks.
KBC4PegvxoFmk1SU.name: Pass without Trace

LyYGPP2oL1c9vzvX.description:
A creature you touch regains a number of Hit Points equal to 2d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The healing increases by 2d8 for each spell slot level above 1.
LyYGPP2oL1c9vzvX.name: Cure Wounds

SHF3PcSeKLaM8UfY.description: You touch a creature and end one condition on it: &Reference[blinded], &Reference[deafened], &Reference[paralyzed], or &Reference[poisoned].
SHF3PcSeKLaM8UfY.name: Lesser Restoration

kYsTzM5cuWinvQqm.description:
Whispering to the spirits of nature, you create one of the following effects within range.

Weather Sensor. You create a Tiny, harmless sensory effect that predicts what the weather will be at your location for the next 24 hours. The effect might manifest as a golden orb for clear skies, a cloud for rain, falling snowflakes for snow, and so on. This effect persists for 1 round.

Bloom. You instantly make a flower blossom, a seed pod open, or a leaf bud bloom.

Sensory Effect. You create a harmless sensory effect, such as falling leaves, spectral dancing fairies, a gentle breeze, the sound of an animal, or the faint odor of skunk. The effect must fit in a 5-foot Cube.

Fire Play. You light or snuff out a candle, a torch, or a campfire.
kYsTzM5cuWinvQqm.name: Druidcraft

lWC2jp0sRaJILIwH.description: The [[lookup @name]] touches another creature with its horn and casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCureWounds]{Cure Wounds} or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLesserRest]{Lesser Restoration} on that creature, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
lWC2jp0sRaJILIwH.name: Unicorn's Blessing

liK9CYrnL3t4Ax8t.description:
For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions.

Break Enchantment. As a Magic action, you touch a creature that is possessed by or has the &Reference[Charmed] or &Reference[Frightened] condition from one or more creatures of the types above. The target is no longer possessed, Charmed, or Frightened by such creatures.

Dismissal. As a Magic action, you target one creature you can see within 5 feet of you that has one of the creature types above. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be sent back to its home plane if it isn't there already. If they aren't on their home plane, Undead are sent to the Shadowfell, and Fey are sent to the Feywild.
liK9CYrnL3t4Ax8t.name: Dispel Evil and Good

mmChargingHorn00.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] moves up to half its Speed without provoking &Reference[Opportunity Attacks], and it makes one [[/item Radiant Horn]] attack.
mmChargingHorn00.name: Charging Horn

mmLegendaryResis.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
mmLegendaryResis.name: Legendary Resistance

mmMagicResistanc.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
mmMagicResistanc.name: Magic Resistance

mmMultiattack000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes one [[/item Hooves]] attack and one [[/item Radiant Horn]] attack.
mmMultiattack000.name: Multiattack

mmShimmeringShie.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] targets itself or one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=sl8NoPhB0e5z6jmK]] it can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=sl8NoPhB0e5z6jmK]] feet of itself. The target gains [[/healing average temp]], and its AC increases by 2 until the end of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s' next turn. The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.
mmShimmeringShie.name: Shimmering Shield

mmSpellcasting00.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]] casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectEvil]{Detect Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDruidcraft]{Druidcraft}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCalmEmotio]{Calm Emotions}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelEvil]{Dispel Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplEntangle00]{Entangle}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPasswithou]{Pass without Trace}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWordofReca]{Word of Recall}
mmSpellcasting00.name: Spellcasting

tqXlS6FGdENkOvOt.description:
You and up to five willing creatures within 5 feet of you instantly teleport to a previously designated sanctuary. You and any creatures that teleport with you appear in the nearest unoccupied space to the spot you designated when you prepared your sanctuary (see below). If you cast this spell without first preparing a sanctuary, the spell has no effect.

You must designate a location, such as a temple, as a sanctuary by casting this spell there.
tqXlS6FGdENkOvOt.name: Word of Recall

wMKtTgo83ZrHpSdD.description:
Grasping plants sprout from the ground in a 20-foot square within range. For the duration, these plants turn the ground in the area into &Reference[difficultterrain]. They disappear when the spell ends.

Each creature (other than you) in the area when you cast the spell must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have the &Reference[restrained apply=false] condition until the spell ends. A Restrained creature can take an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC. On a success, it frees itself from the grasping plants and is no longer Restrained by them.
wMKtTgo83ZrHpSdD.name: Entangle

xsmcD9YZKCIEZ3kr.description:
For the duration, you sense the location of any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself. You also sense whether the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.
xsmcD9YZKCIEZ3kr.name: Detect Evil and Good

mmVampire0000000.name: Vampire
mmVampire0000000.biography:
Vampires

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.y4ooBM6PNZfWH3Tv caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm"]

Token artwork by Forgotten Adventures.

4jEKnNBcbZnPmifL.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one [[/item .mmGraveStrike000]]{Grave Strike} attack.
4jEKnNBcbZnPmifL.name: Deathless Strike

7UhygzsYYtKfVJJ3.description:
One Humanoid you can see within range makes a Wisdom saving throw. It does so with Advantage if you or your allies are fighting it. On a failed save, the target has the &Reference[charmed apply=false] condition until the spell ends or until you or your allies damage it. The Charmed creature is Friendly to you. When the spell ends, the target knows it was Charmed by you.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1.
7UhygzsYYtKfVJJ3.name: Charm Person

IzS0oSSgTDp0oltT.description:
You speak a one-word command to a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or follow the command on its next turn. Choose the command from these options:

Approach. The target moves toward you by the shortest and most direct route, ending its turn if it moves within 5 feet of you.

Drop. The target drops whatever it is holding and then ends its turn.

Flee. The target spends its turn moving away from you by the fastest available means.

Grovel. The target has the Prone condition and then ends its turn.

Halt. On its turn, the target doesn't move and takes no action or Bonus Action.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You can affect one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1.
IzS0oSSgTDp0oltT.name: Command

mmBeguile0000000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCommand000], requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @abilities.cha.dc]]). The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.
mmBeguile0000000.name: Beguile

mmBite0000000000.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=ngPzlEI5pVSdBv86]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=ngPzlEI5pVSdBv86]] within [[lookup @range.value activity=ngPzlEI5pVSdBv86]] feet [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=ngPzlEI5pVSdBv86]].

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage. The target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the [[lookup @name lowercase]] regains Hit Points equal to that amount. A Humanoid reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage and then buried rises the following sunset as a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmVampireSpawn00]{Vampire Spawn} under the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s control.
mmBite0000000000.name: Bite (Bat or Vampire Form Only)

mmCharm000000000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCharmPerso], requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @abilities.cha.dc]]), and the duration is [[lookup @duration.value activity=fcRXSTOlFJShCl52]] hours. The &Reference[Charmed apply=false] target is a willing recipient of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s [[/item .mmBite0000000000]]{Bite}, the damage of which doesn't end the spell. When the spell ends, the target is unaware it was Charmed by the [[lookup @name lowercase]].
mmCharm000000000.name: Charm

mmGraveStrike000.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]) from one of two hands.
mmGraveStrike000.name: Grave Strike (Vampire Form Only)

mmLegendaryResis.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
mmLegendaryResis.name: Legendary Resistance

mmMistyEscape000.description:
If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] drops to 0 Hit Points outside its resting place, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] uses Shape-Shift to become mist (no action required). If it can't use Shape-Shift, it is destroyed.

While it has 0 Hit Points in mist form, it can't return to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it returns to its vampire form and has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition until it regains any Hit Points, and it regains 1 Hit Point after spending 1 hour there.
mmMistyEscape000.name: Misty Escape

mmMultiattack000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes two [[/item .mmGraveStrike000]]{Grave Strike} attacks and uses [[/item .mmBite0000000000]]{Bite}.
mmMultiattack000.name: Multiattack (Vampire Form Only)

mmShapeshift0000.description:
If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] isn't in sunlight or running water, it shape-shifts into a Tiny @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmBat00000000000]{bat} (Speed 5 ft., Fly Speed 30 ft.) or a Medium cloud of mist (Speed 5 ft., Fly Speed 20 ft. [hover]), or it returns to its vampire form. Anything it is wearing transforms with it.

While in bat form, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] can't speak. Its game statistics, other than its size and Speed, are unchanged.

While in mist form, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] can't take any actions, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless and can enter an enemy's space and stop there. If air can pass through a space, the mist can do so, but it can't pass through liquid. It has Resistance to all damage, except the damage it takes from sunlight.
mmShapeshift0000.name: Shape-Shift

mmSpiderClimb000.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
mmSpiderClimb000.name: Spider Climb

mmVampireWeaknes.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has these weaknesses:

Forbiddance. The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.

Running Water. The [[lookup @name lowercase]] takes 20 Acid damage if it ends its turn in running water.

Stake to the Heart. The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is destroyed if a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s heart while the [[lookup @name lowercase]] has the Incapacitated condition.

Sunlight. The [[lookup @name lowercase]] takes 20 Radiant damage if it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.
mmVampireWeaknes.name: Vampire Weakness

mmUmbralDagger00.name: Umbral Dagger

mmVampiricConnec.description: While the [[lookup @name lowercase]] and its vampire master are on the same plane of existence, the vampire can communicate with the [[lookup @name lowercase]] telepathically, and the vampire can perceive through the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s senses.

mmVampireWeaknes.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has these weaknesses:

Forbiddance. The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.

Running Water. The [[lookup @name lowercase]] takes 20 Acid damage if it ends its turn in running water.

Stake to the Heart. The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is destroyed if a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s heart while the [[lookup @name lowercase]] has the Incapacitated condition.

Sunlight. The [[lookup @name lowercase]] takes 20 Radiant damage if it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can grapple one Large creature or up to two Medium or smaller creatures at a time with Whelm.

mmUndeadFortitud.description: If damage reduces the [[lookup @name lowercase]] to 0 Hit Points, it makes a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or from a Critical Hit. On a successful save, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] drops to 1 Hit Point instead.
mmUndeadFortitud.name: Undead Fortitude

MorthosLv0100000.name: Morthos
MorthosLv0100000.biography:
Morthos' investigation into her complex draconic-infernal ancestry led her to an academic life, but it soon became apparent that the fools in charge were keeping many secrets from her.

Token artwork by Forgotten Adventures.

1JVpwy6LP75VKv1W.description: Using a Crowbar gives you Advantage on Strength checks where the Crowbar's leverage can be applied.
1JVpwy6LP75VKv1W.name: Crowbar

1g0GtSr1z1YTUCSZ.description:
You manifest a minor wonder within range. You create one of the effects below within range. If you cast this spell multiple times, you can have up to three of its 1-minute effects active at a time.

Altered Eyes. You alter the appearance of your eyes for 1 minute.

Booming Voice. Your voice booms up to three times as loud as normal for 1 minute. For the duration, you have Advantage on [[/check ability=cha skill=itm]] checks.

Fire Play. You cause flames to flicker, brighten, dim, or change color for 1 minute.

Invisible Hand. You instantaneously cause an unlocked door or window to fly open or slam shut.

Phantom Sound. You create an instantaneous sound that originates from a point of your choice within range, such as a rumble of thunder, the cry of a raven, or ominous whispers.

Tremors. You cause harmless tremors in the ground for 1 minute.
1g0GtSr1z1YTUCSZ.name: Thaumaturgy

2di8Cxo2h4Xaav9N.description:
You touch one Large or smaller object that isn't being worn or carried by someone else. Until the spell ends, the object sheds Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. The light can be colored as you like.

Covering the object with something opaque blocks the light. The spell ends if you cast it again.
2di8Cxo2h4Xaav9N.name: Light

54kCbZAOM89Nbgt0.description:
Ability Scores: Charisma, Constitution, Intelligence

Feat: Magic Initiate (Wizard)

Skill Proficiencies: Arcana, History

Tool Proficiency: Alchemist's Supplies

Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagRobe0000000], @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagInkPen00000], @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagInk00000000], @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagParchment00] (10 Sheets), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagBook0000000] (demons), [[/award 13gp]] or (B) [[/award 50gp]]
54kCbZAOM89Nbgt0.name: Dæmonologist

5IUWvD0SSYmmqsvO.description:
An event in your past left an indelible mark on you, infusing you with simmering magic. As a Bonus Action, you can unleash that magic for 1 minute, during which you gain the following benefits:

  • The spell save DC of your Sorcerer spells increases by 1.
  • You have Advantage on the attack rolls of Sorcerer spells you cast.

You can use this feature twice, and you regain all expended uses of it when you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will increase your spell save DC. The Advantage on attack rolls is not automated.
5IUWvD0SSYmmqsvO.name: Innate Sorcery

6V5RAUeg5oGHoxcH.description:
You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or an object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 Fire damage. A flammable object hit by this spell starts burning if it isn't being worn or carried.

Cantrip Upgrade. The damage increases by 1d10 when you reach levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).
6V5RAUeg5oGHoxcH.name: Fire Bolt

9Cy0JL47AfQCxnpk.description: A Torch burns for 1 hour, casting Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. When you take the Attack action, you can attack with the Torch, using it as a Simple Melee weapon. On a hit, the target takes 1 Fire damage.
9Cy0JL47AfQCxnpk.name: Torch

9mAOCsf1SlJoSiHF.description:
Drawing from your innate magic, you can cast spells. See the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.b2QVn25z2N1ykWpf]{rules on spellcasting}. The information below details how you use those rules with Sorcerer spells, which appear in the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.VfZ5mH2ZuyFq82Ga]{Sorcerer spell list} later in the class's description.

Cantrips. You know four Sorcerer cantrips of your choice. @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLight00000]{Light}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]{Prestidigitation}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplShockingGr]{Shocking Grasp}, and @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSorcerousB]{Sorcerous Burst} are recommended. Whenever you gain a Sorcerer level, you can replace one of your cantrips from this feature with another Sorcerer cantrip of your choice.

When you reach Sorcerer levels 4 and 10, you learn another Sorcerer cantrip of your choice, as shown in the Cantrips column of the Sorcerer Features table.

Spell Slots. The @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSorcerer00000.JournalEntryPage.fsqRUA4acVXH4I3O#class-features]{Sorcerer Features table} shows how many spell slots you have to cast your level 1+ spells. You regain all expended slots when you finish a Long Rest.

Prepared Spells of Level 1+. You prepare the list of level 1+ spells that are available for you to cast with this feature. To start, choose two level 1 Sorcerer spells. Burning Hands and Detect Magic are recommended.

The number of spells on your list increases as you gain Sorcerer levels, as shown in the Prepared Spells column of the Sorcerer Features table. Whenever that number increases, choose additional Sorcerer spells until the number of spells on your list matches the number in the Sorcerer Features table. The chosen spells must be of a level for which you have spell slots. For example, if you're a level 3 Sorcerer, your list of prepared spells can include six Sorcerer spells of level 1 or 2 in any combination.

If another Sorcerer feature gives you spells that you always have prepared, those spells don't count against the number of spells you can prepare with this feature, but those spells otherwise count as Sorcerer spells for you.

Changing Your Prepared Spells. Whenever you gain a Sorcerer level, you can replace one spell on your list with another Sorcerer spell for which you have spell slots.

Spellcasting Ability. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for your Sorcerer spells.

Spellcasting Focus. You can use an Arcane Focus as a Spellcasting Focus for your Sorcerer spells.
9mAOCsf1SlJoSiHF.name: Spellcasting

BW627zhoYvcHHUjK.description: Rations consist of travel-ready food, including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts. See &Reference[Malnutrition] in the rules glossary for the risks of not eating.
BW627zhoYvcHHUjK.name: Rations

CUZC4LZXHNKHOuPP.description: Using Ink, an Ink Pen is used to write or draw.
CUZC4LZXHNKHOuPP.name: Ink Pen

FQWuvDD7m4uGYueC.description: You touch a willing creature who isn't wearing armor. Until the spell ends, the target's base AC becomes 13 plus its Dexterity modifier. The spell ends early if the target dons armor.
FQWuvDD7m4uGYueC.name: Mage Armor

HkBQSbP9KO6JuMRl.description:
As a Utilize action, you can tie a knot with Rope if you succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. The Rope can be burst with a successful DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check.

You can bind an unwilling creature with the Rope only if the creature has the &Reference[Grappled], &Reference[Incapacitated], or &Reference[Restrained] condition. If the creature's legs are bound, the creature has the Restrained condition until it escapes. Escaping the Rope requires the creature to make a successful DC 15 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check as an action.
HkBQSbP9KO6JuMRl.name: Rope

IFQRl1dJkYrVMF72.description:
A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration. The hand vanishes if it is ever more than 30 feet away from you or if you cast this spell again.

When you cast the spell, you can use the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial.

As a Magic action on your later turns, you can control the hand thus again. As part of that action, you can move the hand up to 30 feet.

The hand can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.
IFQRl1dJkYrVMF72.name: Mage Hand

IZpxAkJKiGOSeSqj.description: If you don't drink sufficient water, you risk &Reference[dehydration].
IZpxAkJKiGOSeSqj.name: Water (Pint)

JkFg83wnTbW5bhmb.description:
A thin sheet of flames shoots forth from you. Each creature in a 15-foot Cone makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Flammable objects in the Cone that aren't being worn or carried start burning.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 1.
JkFg83wnTbW5bhmb.name: Burning Hands

KrvSDUkjTA0X3nRb.description: A Robe has vocational or ceremonial significance. Some events and locations admit only people wearing a Robe bearing certain colors or symbols.
KrvSDUkjTA0X3nRb.name: Robe

M0Tra8pMyE32Bm48.description: As a Utilize action, you can spread Caltrops from their bag to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 1 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn. It takes 10 minutes to recover the Caltrops.
M0Tra8pMyE32Bm48.name: Caltrops

TUdg9YC8umvxMEws.description:
You create a magical effect within range. Choose the effect from the options below. If you cast this spell multiple times, you can have up to three of its non-instantaneous effects active at a time.

Sensory Effect. You create an instantaneous, harmless sensory effect, such as a shower of sparks, a puff of wind, faint musical notes, or an odd odor.

Fire Play. You instantaneously light or snuff out a candle, a torch, or a small campfire.

Clean or Soil. You instantaneously clean or soil an object no larger than 1 cubic foot.

Minor Sensation. You chill, warm, or flavor up to 1 cubic foot of nonliving material for 1 hour.

Magic Mark. You make a color, a small mark, or a symbol appear on an object or a surface for 1 hour.

Minor Creation. You create a nonmagical trinket or an illusory image that can fit in your hand. It lasts until the end of your next turn. A trinket can deal no damage and has no monetary worth.
TUdg9YC8umvxMEws.name: Prestidigitation

UOwWtGZZDAyxIwjL.description:
For the duration, you sense the presence of magical effects within 30 feet of yourself. If you sense such effects, you can take the Magic action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears the magic, and if an effect was created by a spell, you learn the spell's school of magic.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.
UOwWtGZZDAyxIwjL.name: Detect Magic

WENNRbwQWmHquB6C.description:
Core Sorcerer Traits

Primary Ability

Charisma

Hit Point Die

D6 per Sorcerer level

Saving Throw Proficiencies

Constitution and Charisma

Skill Proficiencies

Choose 2: Arcana, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion, or Religion

Weapon Proficiencies

Simple weapons

Armor Training

None

Starting Equipment

Choose A or B: (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepSpear00000]{Spear}, 2 @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepDagger0000]{Daggers}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagArcaneFocus]{Arcane Focus} (@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbafcCrystal000]{crystal}), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagDungeoneers]{Dungeoneer's Pack}, and [[/award 28GP]]; or (B) [[/award 50GP]]

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixClass.JournalEntryPage.phbscrSorcerer00 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Becoming a Sorcerer …

As a Level 1 Character

  • Gain all the traits in the Core Sorcerer Traits table.
  • Gain the Sorcerer's level 1 features, which are listed in the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSorcerer00000.JournalEntryPage.fsqRUA4acVXH4I3O#class-features]{Sorcerer Features table}.

As a Multiclass Character

  • Gain the Hit Point Die from the Core Sorcerer Traits table.
  • Gain the Sorcerer's level 1 features, which are listed in the Sorcerer Features table. See the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbCreatingAChar.JournalEntryPage.vcs4jfEKRxPCsgXm]{multiclassing rules} to determine your available spell slots.
WENNRbwQWmHquB6C.name: Sorcerer

WPcIPjV4GycRs8LU.description:
You know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]{Thaumaturgy} cantrip. When you cast it with this trait, the spell uses the same spellcasting ability you use for your Fiendish legacy trait.

Foundry Note

When you're granted this spell it will allow you to choose your spellcasting ability.
WPcIPjV4GycRs8LU.name: Otherworldly Presence

X4USjIinm5abbniG.description: An @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagArcaneFocus]{Arcane Focus} is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use such an item as a Spellcasting Focus.
X4USjIinm5abbniG.name: Crystal

X6o78DbiJccjw0GQ.description: Ink comes in a 1-ounce bottle, which provides enough ink to write about 500 pages.
X6o78DbiJccjw0GQ.name: Ink

XYLne6GZXTGtHTTB.description:
Lightning springs from you to a creature that you try to touch. Make a melee spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 Lightning damage, and it can't make Opportunity Attacks until the start of its next turn.

Cantrip Upgrade. The damage increases by 1d8 when you reach levels 5 (2d8), 11 (3d8), and 17 (4d8).
XYLne6GZXTGtHTTB.name: Shocking Grasp

Y80MDYRd7egi5twt.description:
You can douse a creature, object, or space with Oil or use it as fuel, as detailed below.

Dousing a Creature or an Object. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing an Oil flask. Target one creature or object within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or be covered in oil. If the target takes Fire damage before the oil dries (after 1 minute), the target takes an extra [[/damage 5 type=fire]] damage from burning oil.

Dousing a Space. You can take the Utilize action to pour an Oil flask on level ground to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. If lit, the oil burns until the end of the turn 2 rounds from when the oil was lit (or 12 seconds) and deals 5 Fire damage to any creature that enters the area or ends its turn there. A creature can take this damage only once per turn.

Fuel. Oil serves as fuel for Lamps and Lanterns. Once lit, a flask of Oil burns for 6 hours in a Lamp or Lantern. That duration doesn't need to be consecutive; you can extinguish the burning Oil (as a Utilize action) and rekindle it again until it has burned for a total of 6 hours.
Y80MDYRd7egi5twt.name: Oil

b9MHG62PqnRagXor.description: A Dungeoneer's Pack contains the following items: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagBackpack000]{Backpack}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagCaltrops000]{Caltrops}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagCrowbar0000]{Crowbar}, 2 flasks of @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagOil00000000]{Oil}, 10 days of @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagRations0000]{Rations}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagRope0000000]{Rope}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagTinderbox00]{Tinderbox}, 10 @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagTorch000000]{Torches}, and @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagWaterskin00]{Waterskin}.
b9MHG62PqnRagXor.name: Dungeoneer's Pack

dYzMisQ1FmzcBpuU.description:
You are the recipient of a legacy that grants you supernatural abilities.

When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn a higher-level spell, as shown on the table. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the legacy).

Infernal

The infernal legacy connects tieflings not only to Gehenna but also the Nine Hells and the raging battlefields of Acheron. Horns, spines, tails, golden eyes, and a faint odor of sulfur or smoke are common physical features of such tieflings, most of whom trace their ancestry to devils.

Infernal Legacy Traits
Level 1Level 3Level 5
You have Resistance to Fire damage. You also know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFireBolt00]{Fire Bolt} cantrip.@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHellishReb]{Hellish Rebuke}@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDarkness00]{Darkness}

Foundry Note

The Resistance and spells are granted to you automatically and you will be prompted to choose the spellcasting ability during advancement.
dYzMisQ1FmzcBpuU.name: Fiendish Legacy, Infernal

eCG0H5WoOHOnMW1W.description: A Tinderbox is a small container holding flint, fire steel, and tinder (usually dry cloth soaked in light oil) used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a Candle, Lamp, Lantern, or Torch—or anything else with exposed fuel—takes a Bonus Action. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.
eCG0H5WoOHOnMW1W.name: Tinderbox

eDXDbrDKY5xLUyLt.description: One sheet of Parchment can hold about 250 handwritten words.
eDXDbrDKY5xLUyLt.name: Parchment
